title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Money Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Paytm Money Capital India:
Paytm Money Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money Capital India!
